headline: Stocks See Support from Hopes for a Near-term US-Iran Peace Agreement

headline: Is Intuit Inc. (INTU) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is INTU a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Intuit Inc. on r/ValueInvesting by Crazrwire999. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on INTU. Intuit Inc.’s share was trading at $276.91 as of June 11th. INTU’s trailing and forward P/E were 17.34 and 10.44 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Intuit […]
